title: I am allowed to become new
subtitle: An affirmation for mid-life reinvention
excerpt: For the moment when you want to change direction, career, identity, the shape of your days, and the voice that says it's too late, you should have sorted this earlier, who do you think you are.

practice.whenToUse: When a desire to reinvent — career, lifestyle, identity, the direction of a relationship — meets the internal voice that says it's too late

content.text: An affirmation for the mid-life want to begin again: to change a career, shift a lifestyle, step into a direction that wasn't on the earlier map. The resistance often takes the form of a time argument: there isn't enough of it, you should have started earlier, other people who wanted this started at 25. This affirmation pushes back on the argument with a plain statement.
Say this out loud, three times, hand on heart if that helps:
I am allowed to become new.
Then take one small action toward the new thing. Whatever the smallest version is.
